findings.problem: Sanitization drift: at the highest emotional-pressure point (ring sold, storm incoming), the chapter repeatedly routes conflict into rehearsals, unsent drafts, and list language instead of staging direct interpersonal impact with Nora or June. The difficult moral/emotional consequence is abstracted into process talk.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the motel communication sequence at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:199, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:205, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:215, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:272, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:278, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:284 so at least one exchange is live and two-way. Keep the logistical facts, but deliver them inside contested dialogue and show immediate relational consequence on-page.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised span around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:199-286 contains one completed two-way exchange (minimum 4 lines total) with Nora or June where Eli states a concrete fact (ring sale and/or transfer timing), the other person responds with pressure or boundary, and Eli shows an immediate behavioral or bodily reaction. FAIL if the scene still resolves primarily through unsent drafts, voicemail, or no-response texts.

findings.problem: The middle motel sequence loops through similar rehearsal beats (draft, reject, relist, reorder) without enough leverage shift. Causal pressure pauses instead of escalating until Theo's text response appears.
findings.rewrite_direction: Tighten and resequence the loop at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:205, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:213, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:225, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:233, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:294 so each 3-5 paragraph unit changes the state (new information, commitment, refusal, or route consequence) before the next unit begins.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:199-304, no two consecutive beat blocks repeat the same 'practice then discard' function and each block ends with a new irreversible action (sent message, explicit delay choice, or committed departure condition). FAIL if rehearsal cycles remain functionally repetitive across adjacent blocks.

findings.problem: Timidity: after a strong symbolic rupture (selling the ring), the prose repeatedly backs into managerial framing and document control rather than sustaining unbuffered emotional exposure in-scene.
findings.rewrite_direction: In the emotional run from snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:167 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:340, replace at least one management-style self-edit pass with a direct admission delivered to another character in real time, and keep the aftermath on the page instead of returning immediately to paperwork sorting.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised passage includes one plainspoken admission from Eli without logistics-first hedging and an immediate external consequence (pushback, silence, refusal, or demand) shown before the next planning list appears. FAIL if Eli's hardest admissions remain internal rehearsal only.

findings.problem: Advisory dialogue from different speakers converges toward the same imperative warning cadence ('don't ride the pedal', 'don't leave', 'slow before the curve', 'don't roll'), reducing idiolect separation under pressure.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework warning lines at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:65, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:175, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:258, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:306, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:330 so Armanda, truckers, clerk, and Theo each carry role-specific diction and rhythm rather than a shared caution template.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, in the revised warning exchanges around the cited lines, at least 4 of 5 sampled lines are attributable to the correct speaker without dialogue tags because syntax/diction differ clearly by character. FAIL if warnings remain easily interchangeable when tags are removed.

findings.problem: A recurring negation-driven emphasis formula ('Not X...', 'not X, not Y') appears well over twice, turning into a noticeable chapter tic and flattening rhythmic variation.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the negation-beat cluster at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:5, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:47, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:115, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:195, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:316, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:350 by converting at least half into affirmative, concrete image/action sentences.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if no more than two negation-led contrast constructions remain across the cited spans and emphasis is otherwise carried by concrete sensory/action detail. FAIL if three or more 'Not.../not...not...' constructions still anchor emphasis in those same spans.

findings.problem: Ledger/list construction repeats as a dominant prose engine (cash accounting, three-column napkin, document reordering), so the chapter's texture drifts toward bookkeeping cadence instead of scene pressure.
findings.rewrite_direction: Keep one full accounting block for thematic force, but compress or dramatize the others at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:183, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:233, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:247, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:296 so at least one list turns into embodied action/dialogue.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if only one extended ledger-style block remains among the cited spans and at least one former list section is rewritten as continuous scene action with sensory detail or spoken exchange. FAIL if two or more list blocks stay in near-ledger form.

summary: All four lenses fail at this stage. Continuity and canonical tense checks pass (no clear contradiction with outline/continuity_sheet.json and no sustained drift from past tense), but unresolved HIGH sanitization drift in the family-contact material, plus timidity, mid-scene leverage stalls, advisory-voice convergence, and repeated prose formulas/list cadences keep the chapter below pass threshold.
